

# Needed Libraries

```{r}
library(randomForest)
library(utils)
library(randomForest)
library(forcats)
library(patchwork)
library(spatgeom)
library(RSDA)
library(pracma)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(pracma)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(pracma)
library(tidyr)
library(rlang)
library(scales)
library(parallel)
library(gridExtra)
library(sf)
library(lwgeom)
library(ggplot2)
library(grid)
library(spatstat.random)
library(spatstat.geom)
library(cowplot)
library(tibble)
library(sf)
library(ISLR)
```


<!-- # Ejemplo 2. College -->

<!-- Dataset: *College*. -->
<!-- Target: *Apps* (Número de solicitudes). -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- datos <- College -->
<!-- datos <- datos[, !(names(datos) %in% c("Accept", "Enroll","Private"))] -->
<!-- datos <- datos[datos$Apps != max(datos$Apps), ] -->
<!-- datos <- as.data.frame(scale(datos)) -->
<!-- train <- sample(x = 1:nrow(datos), size = round(nrow(datos) * (2/3))) -->
<!-- datos.train <- datos[train, ] -->
<!-- datos.test <- datos[-train, ] -->
<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- pred <- datos.train$Apps # Variable a predecir -->
<!-- time.res <- system.time({ -->
<!--   res <- empty.space.loss.function.c(datos.train, Apps, pred) -->
<!--   }) -->
<!-- time.res -->
<!-- res2 <- rauc.values(datos.train, res, "Apps") -->
<!-- res2$rauc -->
<!-- res2$plots -->
<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- plots_list <- res2$plots -->
<!-- pdf("aps.pdf", width = 12, height = 18) -->
<!-- wrap_plots(plots_list, ncol = 2, nrow = 7) -->
<!-- dev.off() -->
<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- library(ggplot2) -->

<!-- rauc <- res2$rauc -->

<!-- # Ordenar de menor a mayor -->
<!-- library(forcats) -->

<!-- df <- data.frame( -->
<!--   variable = names(rauc), -->
<!--   rauc = rauc -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- df$variable <- fct_reorder(df$variable, df$rauc, .desc = TRUE) -->

<!-- horizontal <- length(rauc) > 8 -->

<!-- p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = variable, y = rauc)) + -->
<!--   geom_bar(stat = "identity", -->
<!--            fill = "lightblue", -->
<!--            color = "black", -->
<!--            width = 0.7) + -->
<!--   labs( -->
<!--     x = "Variables", -->
<!--     y = "RAUC" -->
<!--   ) + -->
<!--   theme_minimal() + -->
<!--   theme( -->
<!--     axis.text.x = element_text( -->
<!--       angle = ifelse(horizontal, 0, 90), -->
<!--       vjust = 0.5, -->
<!--       hjust = 1, -->
<!--       size = 14 -->
<!--     ), -->
<!--     axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14), -->
<!--     axis.title = element_text(size = 16) -->
<!--   ) -->

<!-- if(horizontal){ -->
<!--   p <- p + coord_flip() -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- p -->

<!-- ggsave("ble.pdf", plot = p, width = 8, height = 6) -->
<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ```{r} -->

<!-- library(randomForest) -->
<!-- library(utils) -->

<!-- set.seed(123) -->

<!-- X <- datos[, -1] -->
<!-- Y <- datos$Apps -->

<!-- p <- ncol(X) -->

<!-- results <- list() -->

<!-- for (k in 1:p) { -->

<!--   combs <- combn(names(X), k, simplify = FALSE) -->

<!--   best_rmse <- Inf -->
<!--   best_vars <- NULL -->

<!--   for (vars in combs) { -->

<!--     folds <- sample(1:5, nrow(datos), replace = TRUE) -->

<!--     fold_rmse <- c() -->

<!--     for (f in 1:5) { -->

<!--       train <- datos[folds != f, ] -->
<!--       test  <- datos[folds == f, ] -->

<!--       rf <- randomForest( -->
<!--         Apps ~ ., -->
<!--         data = train[, c("Apps", vars)], -->
<!--         ntree = 300 -->
<!--       ) -->

<!--       pred <- predict(rf, test[, vars, drop = FALSE]) -->

<!--       fold_rmse <- c(fold_rmse, -->
<!--                      sqrt(mean((test$Apps - pred)^2))) -->
<!--     } -->

<!--     avg_rmse <- mean(fold_rmse) -->

<!--     if (avg_rmse < best_rmse) { -->
<!--       best_rmse <- avg_rmse -->
<!--       best_vars <- vars -->
<!--     } -->
<!--   } -->

<!--   results[[k]] <- list( -->
<!--     size = k, -->
<!--     vars = best_vars, -->
<!--     rmse = best_rmse -->
<!--   ) -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- results -->
<!-- ``` -->








<!-- # Ejemplo 3 House -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- datos <- read.csv("house.csv") -->
<!-- datos <- datos[, sapply(datos, is.numeric)] -->
<!-- vars <- c("price","crime_rate", -->
<!--           "resid_area", -->
<!--           "air_qual", -->
<!--           "room_num", -->
<!--           "age", -->
<!--           "dist1", -->
<!--           "teachers", -->
<!--           "poor_prop") -->
<!-- datos <- datos[, vars] -->
<!-- datos <- as.data.frame(scale(datos)) -->
<!-- train <- sample(x = 1:nrow(datos), size = round(nrow(datos) * (2/3))) -->
<!-- datos.train <- datos[train, ] -->
<!-- datos.test <- datos[-train, ] -->
<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- pred <- datos.train$price  -->
<!-- time.res <- system.time({ -->
<!--   res <- empty.space.loss.function.c(datos.train, price, pred) -->
<!--   }) -->
<!-- time.res -->
<!-- res2 <- rauc.values(datos.train, res, "price") -->
<!-- res2$rauc -->
<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- # Gráfico dispersión-rauc -->
<!-- plots_list <- res2$plots -->
<!-- pdf("gra1.pdf", width = 16, height = 18) -->
<!-- wrap_plots(plots_list, ncol = 2, nrow = 4) -->
<!-- dev.off() -->
<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- library(ggplot2) -->
<!-- library(forcats) -->

<!-- rauc <- res2$rauc -->

<!-- df <- data.frame( -->
<!--   variable = names(rauc), -->
<!--   rauc = rauc -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- df$variable <- fct_reorder(df$variable, df$rauc, .desc = TRUE) -->

<!-- p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = variable, y = rauc)) + -->
<!--   geom_col(fill = "lightblue", -->
<!--            color = "black", -->
<!--            width = 0.7) + -->
<!--   labs( -->
<!--     x = "Variables", -->
<!--     y = "RAUC" -->
<!--   ) + -->
<!--   theme_minimal() + -->
<!--   theme( -->
<!--     axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12), -->
<!--     axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12), -->
<!--     axis.title = element_text(size = 14) -->
<!--   ) + -->
<!--   coord_flip() -->

<!-- p -->

<!-- ggsave("finald.pdf", plot = p, width = 8, height = 5) -->
<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- ```  -->

# Ejemplo 4.

```{r}
minmax <- function(x){
  (x - min(x)) / (max(x) - min(x))
}
rauc.valuesk <- function(datos, res, target){
  scale_minmax <- function(x){
    (x - min(x)) / (max(x) - min(x))
  }
  datos <- as.data.frame(lapply(datos, scale_minmax))
  df <- res$results[[1]]$geom_indices
  df <- df[order(df$alpha), ]
  df <- df[!duplicated(df$alpha), ]
  vars <- "embedding"
  rauc_values <- numeric(1)
  names(rauc_values) <- vars
  plots <- list()
  make_step <- function(x, y){
    data.frame(
      x = rep(x, each = 2)[-1],
      y = rep(y, each = 2)[-length(y)*2 + 1]
    )
  }
  n <- nrow(datos)
  alpha <- c(0, df$alpha)
  phi   <- c(1, df$geom_corr)
  step_df <- make_step(alpha, phi)
  auc_phi <- trapz(step_df$x, step_df$y)
  csr <- exp(-n * pi * alpha^2)
  csr[1] <- 1
  alpha_max <- max(alpha)
  auc_csr <- (1 / (2 * sqrt(n))) * erf(sqrt(n * pi) * alpha_max)
  rauc <- auc_csr / auc_phi
  rauc_values[1] <- rauc
  csr_df <- data.frame(alpha = alpha, y = csr, ymin = 0)
  step_df$ymin <- 0
  p1 <- ggplot(datos, aes_string(x = names(datos)[1], y = target)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, color = "black") +
    labs(x = "PC1 / X", y = target) +
    theme_minimal()
  p2 <- ggplot() +
    geom_ribbon(data = step_df,
                aes(x = x, ymin = ymin, ymax = y),
                fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_step(data = step_df,
              aes(x = x, y = y),
              color = "darkred", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_ribbon(data = csr_df,
                aes(x = alpha, ymin = ymin, ymax = y),
                fill = "blue", alpha = 0.2) +
    geom_line(data = csr_df,
              aes(x = alpha, y = y),
              color = "blue", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
    labs(
      x = expression(alpha),
      y = expression(L(alpha)),
      title = "Geometric Embedding RAUC"
    ) +
    ylim(0, 1) +
    theme_minimal()

  plots[[1]] <- p1 + p2

  return(list(
    rauc = rauc_values,
    plots = plots
  ))
}
compute_alpha_shape.pca <- function(coords, alpha_value){

  library(sf)
  library(lwgeom)

  # 1. Convertir a sf
  pts <- st_as_sf(coords, coords = c("PC1", "PC2"))

  # 2. Triangulación de Delaunay
  tri <- st_triangulate(st_union(pts))

  # 🔥 FIX IMPORTANTE
  tri <- st_collection_extract(tri, "POLYGON")
  tri <- st_as_sf(tri)

  # 3. Líneas y segmentos
  lines <- st_cast(tri, "LINESTRING")
  lines_split <- st_split(lines, pts)

  # 4. max_length
  max_length <- sapply(lines_split, function(x){
    max(st_length(st_cast(st_sfc(x))))
  })

  # 5. Data frame de triángulos
  triangles <- st_sf(
    geometry = tri$geometry,
    max_length = as.numeric(max_length),
    alpha = as.numeric(max_length) / 2
  )

  # 6. Filtrado α-shape
  alpha_tri <- triangles[triangles$max_length <= 2 * alpha_value, ]

  # 7. Unión (solo para contorno)
  shape_union <- st_union(alpha_tri)

  return(list(
    shape = shape_union,
    triangles = triangles,
    alpha_tri = alpha_tri
  ))
}
plot_alpha_shape.pca <- function(coords, alpha_value){

  res <- compute_alpha_shape.pca(coords, alpha_value)

  ggplot() +

    # 🔷 Triangulación completa (gris)
    geom_sf(data = res$triangles,
            fill = NA,
            color = "gray80",
            linewidth = 0.3) +

    # 🔵 Triángulos del α-shape
    geom_sf(data = res$alpha_tri,
            fill = "lightblue",
            color = "blue",
            alpha = 0.5) +

    # 🔴 Contorno final
    geom_sf(data = res$shape,
            fill = NA,
            color = "darkblue",
            linewidth = 1.2) +

    # ⚫ Puntos
    geom_point(data = coords,
               aes(x = PC1, y = PC2),
               size = 1) +

labs(
  title = bquote(alpha == .(round(alpha_value, 3))),
  x = "PCA1",
  y = "PCA2"
)

    theme_minimal()
}
plot_multiple_alpha.pca <- function(coords, alpha_values){

  plots <- lapply(alpha_values, function(a){
    plot_alpha_shape(coords, a)
  })

  return(plots)
}
plot_alpha_shape.iris <- function(coords, alpha_value){

  shape <- compute_alpha_shape(coords, alpha_value)

  ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = shape, fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.3) +
    geom_point(data = coords,
               aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Species),
               size = 1.8) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Alpha-shape (alpha =", round(alpha_value, 3), ")"),
      x = "UMAP1",
      y = "UMAP2"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
}
compute_alpha_shape.umap <- function(coords, alpha_value){

  # 1. Convertir a objeto sf
  pts <- st_as_sf(coords, coords = c("UMAP1", "UMAP2"))

  # 2. Triangulación de Delaunay
  tri <- st_triangulate(st_union(pts))
  tri <- st_collection_extract(st_sfc(tri), "POLYGON")

  # 3. Convertir a líneas y dividir en segmentos
  lines <- st_cast(tri, "LINESTRING")
  lines_split <- st_split(lines, pts)

  # 4. Calcular longitud máxima por triángulo
  max_length <- sapply(lines_split, function(x){
    max(st_length(st_cast(st_sfc(x))))
  })

  # 5. Crear estructura tipo spatgeom
  triangles <- st_sf(
    geometry = tri,
    max_length = as.numeric(max_length),
    alpha = as.numeric(max_length) / 2
  )

  # 6. Filtrar triángulos (α-shape)
  alpha_tri <- triangles[triangles$max_length <= 2 * alpha_value, ]

  # 7. Unión geométrica
  shape_union <- st_union(alpha_tri)

  return(shape_union)
}
plot_alpha_shape.umap <- function(coords, alpha_value){
  shape <- compute_alpha_shape.umap(coords, alpha_value)
  ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = shape, fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.4) +
    geom_point(data = coords, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2), size = 1) +
    labs(x = "UMAP1",
      y = "UMAP2"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()}
rauc.valuesk2 <- function(datos, res, target){

  # 🔥 NO reescalar aquí (ya viene escalado)
  datos_num <- datos[, sapply(datos, is.numeric)]

  library(pracma)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)

  df <- res$results[[1]]$geom_indices
  df <- df[order(df$alpha), ]
  df <- df[!duplicated(df$alpha), ]

  vars <- "embedding"
  rauc_values <- numeric(1)
  names(rauc_values) <- vars
  plots <- list()

  make_step <- function(x, y){
    data.frame(
      x = rep(x, each = 2)[-1],
      y = rep(y, each = 2)[-length(y)*2 + 1]
    )
  }

  n <- nrow(datos_num)
  alpha <- c(0, df$alpha)
  phi   <- c(1, df$geom_corr)
  step_df <- make_step(alpha, phi)
  auc_phi <- trapz(step_df$x, step_df$y)

  # CSR
  csr <- exp(-n * pi * alpha^2)
  csr[1] <- 1
  alpha_max <- max(alpha)
  auc_csr <- (1 / (2 * sqrt(n))) * erf(sqrt(n * pi) * alpha_max)

  # RAUC
  rauc <- auc_csr / auc_phi
  rauc_values[1] <- rauc

  csr_df <- data.frame(alpha = alpha, y = csr, ymin = 0)
  step_df$ymin <- 0

  # 🔥 Scatter con contorno negro y relleno azul
  p1 <- ggplot(datos, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2)) +
    geom_point(shape = 21, fill = "blue", color = "black", size = 3, stroke = 0.7, alpha = 0.8) +
    labs(x = "PC1", y = "PC2") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

  # Curva RAUC con f(alpha)
  p2 <- ggplot() +
    geom_ribbon(data = step_df,
                aes(x = x, ymin = ymin, ymax = y),
                fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_step(data = step_df,
              aes(x = x, y = y),
              color = "darkred", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_ribbon(data = csr_df,
                aes(x = alpha, ymin = ymin, ymax = y),
                fill = "blue", alpha = 0.2) +
    geom_line(data = csr_df,
              aes(x = alpha, y = y),
              color = "blue", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
    labs(
      x = expression(alpha),
      y = expression(f(alpha))
    ) +
    ylim(0, 1) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

  plots[[1]] <- p1 + p2

  return(list(
    rauc = rauc_values,
    plots = plots
  ))
}
```

##pca dataset penguins

```{r}
library(FactoMineR)
library(factoextra)
data <- penguins
penguins_num <- penguins[, sapply(penguins, is.numeric)]
str(penguins_num)
head(penguins_num)
colSums(is.na(penguins_num))
penguins_num <- na.omit(penguins_num)
res.pca <- PCA(penguins_num, scale.unit = TRUE, graph = FALSE)
fviz_pca_ind(res.pca,
             geom = "point",
             label = "none")
coord <- as.data.frame(res.pca$ind$coord[, 1:2])
colnames(coord) <- c("PC1", "PC2")
coord <- as.data.frame(lapply(coord, minmax))
pred <- coords$PC2# Variable a predecir
res <- spatgeom(y = pred, x = coord$PC1, scale =F)
res2 <-rauc.valuesk(coord, res, pred)
res2$plots
plot_alpha_shape.pca(coords, alpha_value = 1)
```

##umap dataset penguins

```{r}
library(umap)
library(ggplot2)
data <- penguins
penguins_num <- penguins[, sapply(penguins, is.numeric)]
penguins_num <- na.omit(penguins_num)
umap_res <- umap(penguins_num)
coord <- as.data.frame(umap_res$layout)
colnames(coord) <- c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")
minmax <- function(x){
  (x - min(x)) / (max(x) - min(x))
}
coord <- as.data.frame(lapply(coord, minmax))

ggplot(coord, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal()

pred <- coord$UMAP2   
res <- spatgeom(y = pred, x = coord$UMAP1, scale = FALSE)

res2 <- rauc.valuesk(coord, res, pred)

res2$plots

plot_alpha_shape.umap(coord, alpha_value = 0.2)
```


##pca dataset iris

```{r}
## =========================
## PCA DATASET IRIS
## =========================
library(FactoMineR)
library(factoextra)
library(ggplot2)

data(iris)

# Solo variables numéricas
iris_num <- iris[, sapply(iris, is.numeric)]

# PCA
res.pca <- PCA(iris_num, scale.unit = TRUE, graph = FALSE)

# Coordenadas
coord <- as.data.frame(res.pca$ind$coord[, 1:2])
colnames(coord) <- c("PC1", "PC2")

# Agregar especie
coord$Species <- iris$Species

# Min-Max (solo a las columnas numéricas)
minmax <- function(x){
  (x - min(x)) / (max(x) - min(x))
}

coord[, c("PC1","PC2")] <- lapply(coord[, c("PC1","PC2")], minmax)

# =========================
# VISUALIZACIÓN COLOREADA
# =========================
ggplot(coord, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Species)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "PCA - Iris (coloreado por especie)")

# =========================
# PIPELINE GEOMÉTRICO
# =========================
pred <- coord$PC2

res <- spatgeom(y = pred, x = coord$PC1, scale = FALSE)

res1 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord, res, pred)

res1$plots

# α-shape (sin color interno, pero puntos sí)
plot_alpha_shape.iris(coord, alpha_value = 0)
gra1 <- plot_alpha_shape.iris(coord, alpha_value = 0.1)
plot_alpha_shape.iris(coord, alpha_value = 0.2)
plot_alpha_shape.iris(coord, alpha_value = 0.3)
plot_alpha_shape.iris(coord, max(res$results[[1]]$geom_indices$alpha))

```

##umap dataset iris

```{r}
## =========================
## UMAP DATASET IRIS
## =========================
library(umap)
library(ggplot2)

data(iris)

# =========================
# SOLO NUMÉRICAS
# =========================
iris_num <- iris[, sapply(iris, is.numeric)]

# =========================
# UMAP
# =========================
umap_res <- umap(iris_num)

coord <- as.data.frame(umap_res$layout)
colnames(coord) <- c("PC1", "PC2")   # 🔥 CLAVE: usar mismos nombres que PCA

# Agregar especie
coord$Species <- iris$Species

# =========================
# MIN-MAX
# =========================
minmax <- function(x){
  (x - min(x)) / (max(x) - min(x))
}

coord[, c("PC1","PC2")] <- lapply(coord[, c("PC1","PC2")], minmax)

# =========================
# VISUALIZACIÓN COLOREADA
# =========================
ggplot(coord, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Species)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "UMAP - Iris (coloreado por especie)")

# =========================
# PIPELINE GEOMÉTRICO
# =========================
pred <- coord$PC2

res <- spatgeom(y = pred, x = coord$PC1, scale = FALSE)

res2 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord, res, pred)

res2$plots

# =========================
# α-shape (COLOREADO)
# =========================
gra2 <- plot_alpha_shape.iris(coord, alpha_value = 0.45)
```

```{r}
gra3 <-res1$plots[[1]]
gra4 <-res2$plots[[1]]
gra1
gra2
gra3
gra4

p <- (gra3 | gra4) /
     (gra1 | gra2)

pdf("spg.pdf", width = 12, height = 10)
print(p)
dev.off()
```


# Experimento 5

```{r}
library(umap)
library(ggplot2)
minmax <- function(x){
  (x - min(x)) / (max(x) - min(x))
}

data(iris)
iris_num <- iris[, sapply(iris, is.numeric)]


# 1. Pocos vecinos → estructura muy local
config1 <- umap.defaults
config1$metric <- "euclidean"
config1$n_neighbors <- 5
model1 <- umap(iris_num, config = config1)

# 2. Valor intermedio (default típico ~15)
config2 <- umap.defaults
config2$metric <- "euclidean"
config2$n_neighbors <- 15
model2 <- umap(iris_num, config = config2)

# 3. Muchos vecinos → estructura más global
config3 <- umap.defaults
config3$metric <- "euclidean"
config3$n_neighbors <- 50
model3 <- umap(iris_num, config = config3)


# 4. Pocos vecinos → estructura muy local
config4 <- umap.defaults
config4$metric <- "manhattan"
config4$n_neighbors <- 5
model4 <- umap(iris_num, config = config4)

# 5. Valor intermedio (default típico ~15)
config5 <- umap.defaults
config5$metric <- "manhattan"
config5$n_neighbors <- 15
model5 <- umap(iris_num, config = config5)

# 6. Muchos vecinos → estructura más global
config6 <- umap.defaults
config6$metric <- "manhattan"
config6$n_neighbors <- 50
model6 <- umap(iris_num, config = config6)

# 7. Pocos vecinos → estructura muy local
config7 <- umap.defaults
config7$metric <- "cosine"
config7$n_neighbors <- 5
model7 <- umap(iris_num, config = config7)

# 8. Valor intermedio (default típico ~15)
config8 <- umap.defaults
config8$metric <- "cosine"
config8$n_neighbors <- 15
model8 <- umap(iris_num, config = config8)

# 9. Muchos vecinos → estructura más global
config9 <- umap.defaults
config9$metric <- "cosine"
config9$n_neighbors <- 50
model9 <- umap(iris_num, config = config9)

coord1 <- as.data.frame(model1$layout)
colnames(coord1) <- c("PC1", "PC2")  
coord1$Species <- iris$Species
coord1[, c("PC1","PC2")] <- lapply(coord1[, c("PC1","PC2")], minmax)

coord2 <- as.data.frame(model2$layout)
colnames(coord2) <- c("PC1", "PC2")  
coord2$Species <- iris$Species
coord2[, c("PC1","PC2")] <- lapply(coord2[, c("PC1","PC2")], minmax)

coord3 <- as.data.frame(model3$layout)
colnames(coord3) <- c("PC1", "PC2")  
coord3$Species <- iris$Species
coord3[, c("PC1","PC2")] <- lapply(coord3[, c("PC1","PC2")], minmax)

coord4 <- as.data.frame(model4$layout)
colnames(coord4) <- c("PC1", "PC2")  
coord4$Species <- iris$Species
coord4[, c("PC1","PC2")] <- lapply(coord4[, c("PC1","PC2")], minmax)

coord5 <- as.data.frame(model5$layout)
colnames(coord5) <- c("PC1", "PC2")  
coord5$Species <- iris$Species
coord5[, c("PC1","PC2")] <- lapply(coord5[, c("PC1","PC2")], minmax)

coord6 <- as.data.frame(model6$layout)
colnames(coord6) <- c("PC1", "PC2")  
coord6$Species <- iris$Species
coord6[, c("PC1","PC2")] <- lapply(coord6[, c("PC1","PC2")], minmax)

coord7 <- as.data.frame(model7$layout)
colnames(coord7) <- c("PC1", "PC2")  
coord7$Species <- iris$Species
coord7[, c("PC1","PC2")] <- lapply(coord7[, c("PC1","PC2")], minmax)

coord8 <- as.data.frame(model8$layout)
colnames(coord8) <- c("PC1", "PC2")  
coord8$Species <- iris$Species
coord8[, c("PC1","PC2")] <- lapply(coord8[, c("PC1","PC2")], minmax)

coord9 <- as.data.frame(model9$layout)
colnames(coord9) <- c("PC1", "PC2")  
coord9$Species <- iris$Species
coord9[, c("PC1","PC2")] <- lapply(coord9[, c("PC1","PC2")], minmax)

coord1 <- select(coord1, -Species)

pred1 <- coord1$PC2
res1 <- spatgeom(y = pred1, x = coord1$PC1, scale = FALSE)
res11 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord1, res1, pred1)


pred2 <- coord2$PC2
res2 <- spatgeom(y = pred2, x = coord2$PC1, scale = FALSE)
res22 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord2, res2, pred2)

pred3 <- coord3$PC2
res3 <- spatgeom(y = pred3, x = coord3$PC1, scale = FALSE)
res33 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord3, res3, pred3)


pred4 <- coord4$PC2
res4 <- spatgeom(y = pred4, x = coord4$PC1, scale = FALSE)
res44 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord4, res4, pred4)


pred5 <- coord5$PC2
res5 <- spatgeom(y = pred5, x = coord5$PC1, scale = FALSE)
res55 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord5, res5, pred5)

pred6 <- coord6$PC2
res6 <- spatgeom(y = pred6, x = coord6$PC1, scale = FALSE)
res66 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord6, res6, pred6)


pred7 <- coord7$PC2
res7 <- spatgeom(y = pred7, x = coord7$PC1, scale = FALSE)
res77 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord7, res7, pred7)


pred8 <- coord8$PC2
res8 <- spatgeom(y = pred8, x = coord8$PC1, scale = FALSE)
res88 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord8, res8, pred8)


pred9 <- coord9$PC2
res9 <- spatgeom(y = pred9, x = coord9$PC1, scale = FALSE)
res99 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord9, res9, pred9)

a <- res11$rauc
b <- res22$rauc
c <- res33$rauc
d <- res44$rauc
e <- res55$rauc
f <- res66$rauc
g <- res77$rauc
h <- res88$rauc
i <- res99$rauc

raucs <- as.numeric(c(a,b,c,d,e,f,g,h,i))

```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(forcats)

rauc_num <- c(0.10852245, 0.09859518, 0.09665856, 0.12045026, 0.08687756, 0.07041286, 0.11028608, 0.07828442, 0.11004922)

df <- data.frame(
  variable = c(
    "Euclidean (5)",
    "Euclidean (15)",
    "Euclidean (50)",
    "Manhattan (5)",
    "Manhattan (15)",
    "Manhattan (50)",
    "Cosine (5)",
    "Cosine (15)",
    "Cosine (50)"
  ),
  rauc = raucs
)

# ordenar de mayor a menor (como tu ejemplo)
df$variable <- fct_reorder(df$variable, df$rauc, .desc = TRUE)

p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = variable, y = rauc)) +
  geom_col(fill = "lightblue",
           color = "black",
           width = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    x = "UMAP configurations (Metric, Neighbors)",
    y = "RAUC"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14)
  )

p

ggsave("finald.pdf", plot = p, width = 8, height = 5)
``` 

```{r}
im1 <- res11$plots[[1]]
im2 <- res22$plots[[1]]
im3 <- res33$plots[[1]]
im4 <- res44$plots[[1]]
im5 <- res55$plots[[1]]
im6 <- res66$plots[[1]]
im7 <- res77$plots[[1]]
im8 <- res88$plots[[1]]
im9 <- res99$plots[[1]]

library(gridExtra)
library(grid)

library(patchwork)

p <- (im1 | im2 | im3) /
     (im4 | im5 | im6) /
     (im7 | im8 | im9)

ggsave("umd.pdf", p, width = 14, height = 10)

```

```{r}
a <- res11$plots
b <- res22$plots
c <- res33$plots
d <- res44$plots
e <- res55$plots
f <- res66$plots
g <- res77$plots
h <- res88$plots
i <- res99$plots

library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# Extraemos los plots de cada lista
plots_list <- list(a[[1]], b[[1]], c[[1]],
                   d[[1]], e[[1]], f[[1]],
                   g[[1]], h[[1]], i[[1]])

# Armamos la matriz 3x3 con patchwork
final_plot <- (plots_list[[1]] | plots_list[[2]] | plots_list[[3]]) /
              (plots_list[[4]] | plots_list[[5]] | plots_list[[6]]) /
              (plots_list[[7]] | plots_list[[8]] | plots_list[[9]])

# Guardar en PDF
pdf("tx3.pdf", width = 14, height = 9)  # tamaño en pulgadas
print(final_plot)
dev.off()
```


```{r}
pdf("sp.pdf", width = 12, height = 4)

par(mfrow = c(1, 3), mar = c(2, 2, 2, 2))

# Regularidad (≈500 puntos)
modelo_reg <- sim_regular(500)
plot(modelo_reg, pch = 16, cex = 1.3, axes = FALSE, xlab = "", ylab = "")
box()  # mantiene el marco

# Independencia (500 puntos)
modelo_ind <- sim_independence(500)
plot(modelo_ind, pch = 16, cex = 1.3, axes = FALSE, xlab = "", ylab = "")
box()  # mantiene el marco

# Clustering (500 puntos)
modelo_clu <- sim_cluster(500)
plot(modelo_clu, pch = 16, cex = 1.3, axes = FALSE, xlab = "", ylab = "")
box()  # mantiene el marco

dev.off()

cat("Listo: 'sp.pdf' guardado en:", getwd())
```
